record.field:
Dear {{ object.employee_id.name }},

As part of the offboarding process, please return the following company assets by {{ object.date_asset_deadline or object.date_last_work }}:

{% for line in object.line_ids %} {% endfor %}
Asset Code Asset Name Value
{{ line.asset_id.code or '' }} {{ line.asset_id.name }} {{ '{:,.0f}'.format(line.asset_value) }} VNĐ

Please coordinate with your Branch Manager for the handover. Failure to return assets may result in financial deductions.

Regards,
HR Department

Dear Director,

The offboarding process for {{ object.employee_id.name }} is ready for your review and approval.

  • Total Assets: {{ object.total_assets }}
  • Returned (Good): {{ object.returned_assets }}
  • Damaged: {{ object.damaged_assets }}
  • Missing: {{ object.missing_assets }}
    • {% if object.compensation_amount > 0 %}
  • Compensation Required: {{ '{:,.0f}'.format(object.compensation_amount) }} VNĐ
    • {% endif %}

Please log in to Odoo to approve and finalize the offboarding record: {{ object.name }}.

Regards,
HR Department
